summary: Regression for BILL4PE UX changes (Cash payment mode, PDF date+time, tagline) + AI/voice/reports endpoints + GSTIN auto-print + referral validate + phone-OTP. Backend pytest: 41/42 PASS (1 pre-existing test-fixture failure: missing /tmp/thali.jpg for Gemini detect-items). Frontend smoke: Landing pill 'AN INTELLIGENT BILLING' verified, phone OTP (9999999999/123456) login works, Dashboard date+time format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM verified (3 sample rows '2026-05-28 08:27' etc), 'AI Powered Reimbursement' stale tagline removed.

minor.issue: Returns 404 for unknown codes instead of 200 {valid:false} — frontend should handle both (currently treats 404 as invalid which works, but inconsistent with happy-path 200)
Returns 422 for silent/empty audio with detail 'Could not hear anything in the audio' (acceptable behavior, but 400/422 split could be standardized)

issues: First-run AI-Vision onboarding overlay covers the Splash AI Tool grid (ReceiptScan/VoiceExpense). The order swap (Receipt first, then Voice) is verified via static source (Splash.jsx lines 137 & 140) but cannot be visually asserted until the onboarding is dismissed. Suggest auto-storing the onboarded flag after first dismiss so re-login does not always re-trigger overlay.

design_issues.screen: Brand logo on dark surfaces (pre-existing from iter-2)
issues: /public/logo.png rendered with `brightness(0) invert(1)` collapses to a white blob — replace with a transparent SVG/PNG containing the actual wordmark.

action_items: Add /tmp/thali.jpg fixture (or skip test_ai_detect_items_food when fixture missing) to remove the single pytest failure
(Optional) Standardize /api/referrals/validate to always return 200 with {valid: bool} to match the documented contract
(Optional) Persist 'onboarded' flag in localStorage so the AI-Vision overlay doesn't re-show every login (currently obscures Splash content for new browser sessions)

Note: The original problem statement said convenience fee is ₹2 deducted on POST /api/expenses; actual implementation deducts ₹5 (BILL_FEE=5.0) on POST /api/bills/{eid}/generate. This is by design per existing tests (test_generate_bill_deducts_5_and_idempotent passes). If product wants ₹2 on expense creation, that's a separate task.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1648 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; split into routers (auth, expenses, bills, reports, ai, wallet) and pdf builders
Bill/Report PDF date+time uses naive string slicing `created_at[:16].replace('T',' ')` — works because now_iso() returns ISO with 'T'; safer to parse and reformat with datetime.strftime
/api/referrals/validate/{code} raises 404 for unknown codes; FE expects {valid:false} truthy contract — minor mismatch
PayNow.jsx force-starts html5-qrcode on `scan` stage even on devices without mediaDevices (pre-existing) — pay-cash-skip-btn now provides a clean exit, good

Voice expense returns HTTP 422 with detail string (FastAPI-style validation error code) for non-validation business issue ('Could not hear anything') — should be 400/422 consistently; consider 400 since it is a business condition not pydantic validation
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bill4pe_v2.py (new file — 16 tests for Cash mode, /reports PDF, AI scan-receipt, voice/expense, GSTIN auto-print, PDF date+time tagline, phone OTP, referrals validate)

success_rate.frontend: smoke only — Landing tagline + Phone OTP login + Dashboard date+time format verified, deeper Cash flow E2E blocked by onboarding overlay but static JSX & data-testids confirmed present

test_credentials: Phone OTP: 9999999999 / 123456 (mocked). Email/password: any new email + Secret@12345 via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Each pytest session creates 2 fresh users + cash/UPI/GSTIN expenses + a report titled 'TEST_QA Report' under each user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file is /app/backend/tests/test_bill4pe_v2.py (16 tests, ALL PASS) — covers: phone OTP login, referrals me/validate, Cash payment_method end-to-end (create expense + generate bill + PDF text extracts 'Payment Method' + 'Cash' via pypdf), Reports PDF has tagline 'Intelligent Billing' and YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM date pattern, GSTIN save+invalid+auto-print on PDF (extracted via pypdf), /api/ai/scan-receipt route exists, /api/voice/expense route exists (returns 422 'Could not hear anything' for silent audio — acceptable). PDF text extraction must use pypdf.PdfReader (ReportLab's output uses ASCII85 compressed streams; substring grep on raw bytes does not work). The single remaining pytest failure is /tmp/thali.jpg missing — pre-existing in test_bill4pe.py iter-1/2, gated behind os.path.exists assertion.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Backend Cash payment mode, AI/voice endpoints, reports, GSTIN auto-print, phone OTP, referral validate, PDF date+time, QR verification URL, tagline ('An Intelligent Billing — Scan QR to verify authenticity') are all wired correctly. Frontend changes (PayNow data-testids paymode-upi-btn/paymode-cash-btn/pay-cash-skip-btn/confirm-payment-btn, Splash order ReceiptScan→VoiceExpense, Landing pill 'AN INTELLIGENT BILLING') are present in source and where reachable confirmed live.
